user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter the holiday list by location and year, so that I see holidays relevant to my office and calendar year
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Holiday List screen; When I select a Location and Year and click Search; Then the holiday list is filtered to that location and year

user_story: As an Employee, I want to view holiday details including name, date, day and status, so that I can plan my work around official holidays
acceptance_criteria: Given I have searched the holiday list; When the results load; Then each holiday shows its name, date, day and status

user_story: As an Employee, I want to confirm an optional holiday, so that my chosen optional holiday is registered against my calendar
acceptance_criteria: Given optional holidays are available in the list; When I use Confirm optional holiday; Then my selected optional holiday is confirmed

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the holiday list, so that I see the most up to date holiday and swap information
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Holiday List screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data

user_story: As an Employee, I want to see swap-with information for holidays, so that I know which holidays can be exchanged
acceptance_criteria: Given I am viewing the holiday list; When a holiday allows swapping; Then the Swap with column shows the exchange option
